message:
fix(missions): Go backend + frontend hardening (#7130-#7142) (#7162)

* fix(missions): harden Go backend HTTP handling and cache safety

- Add Content-Type: application/json to all GitHub API POST requests
  (fork, refs, PR) to prevent silent 415 errors (#7133)
- Drain HTTP response bodies on error paths before returning, preventing
  TCP connection pool exhaustion (#7137)
- Use SplitN with guard for fork full_name parsing (#7138)
- Add safety exit in eviction loop when entries map is empty (#7132)
- Wrap single GitHub file responses in array for frontend compat (#7134)
- Always query upstream repo for default_branch instead of trusting
  fork metadata, fixing master-branch repos (#7135)

Fixes #7130, #7131, #7132, #7133, #7134, #7135, #7136, #7137, #7138, #7139

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix(missions): prevent unmount leaks, JSON parse crashes, poll overrun

- Add isMountedRef check in waitForPhaseCompletion to stop ghost polling
  after dialog close (#7140)
- Wrap agent res.json() in try/catch to handle non-JSON responses from
  reverse proxies (#7141)
- Add early terminal-status check at poll() entry to prevent interval
  callbacks from firing network requests on resolved missions (#7142)

Fixes #7140, #7141, #7142

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
